comments.author: AE1981
comments.snippet:
This feature would be verry helpfull. 
I have also several credentials for several Offices and currently need to change the Password on 200 Connections after a Password Change. 
A kind of Password Manager like a Dropdown for saved credentials  in a connection Profile would be really usefull. 
So that all credentials are Centrally managed and just need to be changed once.

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: I was thinking to implement similar to such in next generation, that will include settings for dbs as well so not a small part of planed changes.

comments.author: AE1981
comments.snippet:
This Issue /feature request is still valid. 
Some kind of Password manager would be nice to centrally save credentials and use them for Groups/Connections per Dropdown.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.
